payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.taskTitle: Add exact-address lookup for crystallized memory
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Add exact-address lookup for crystallized memory" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Add exact-address lookup for crystallized memory" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?
semanticNodeLabels: Add exact-address lookup for crystallized memory
Replace ad hoc Victor memory identity with deterministic UOR addressing so memory writes, lookups, deduplication, and supersession lineage are cryptographically and semantically stable.
Content-addressed identity uses the designated BLAKE3 pipeline.
Introduce canonical UOR address type and BLAKE3 content addressing
Crystallized memory supports direct address lookup.
Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
recommendedNextActions: Implement crystallized memory supports direct address lookup

before.title: Add exact-address lookup for crystallized memory
before.description: Introduce O(1) address lookup for stable L3 memory so saturated artifacts can exit the expensive similarity-search path when exact identity is known.
acceptance: Crystallized memory supports direct address lookup.
Retrieval can short-circuit on exact L3 address matches.
Exact-match recall remains auditable and backward-compatible.
